items.name: Timmy-Tmux-Sessioniser
items.description: Timmy is a small CLI tool that helps you switch into project directories and open them in tmux sessions.  It reads a list of saved paths, includes the current working directory, and lets you pick one using fzf. After selection, it either attaches to an existing tmux session for that path or creates a new one in that directory.
